$comment: Manifest mapping profiles to skills/hooks/templates. Consumed by install.ps1/install.sh -Profile flag (Phase 2). Skills/hooks stay in their current flat layout; this file declares membership, not file location.

defaults.note: If no -Profile is passed, install.ps1/install.sh installs core + java-spring-backend.

core.description: Stack-agnostic SDD lifecycle, guardrails, and generic reviews. Always installed.

java-spring-backend.description: Java 17/21, Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Maven (primary), REST APIs, JPA/Hibernate, Flyway, Keycloak/OAuth2, Vault. Default profile.
java-spring-backend.note: Skills marked here that do not yet have a SKILL.md are planned (Phase 2+). The installer skips missing skills gracefully.

messaging-event-driven.description: Kafka, RabbitMQ, ActiveMQ, event-driven architecture, outbox, saga, exactly-once/at-least-once semantics.
messaging-event-driven.note: Designed as overlay on java-spring-backend. Skills planned for Phase 3.

payments-fintech.description: Payment processing, Stripe/PSP integration, idempotency, reconciliation, money/units safety, webhook signature verification.
payments-fintech.note: Overlay profile. Can combine with java-spring-backend or next-prisma-web.

next-prisma-web.description: Next.js App Router, React, TypeScript, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, Server Components/Actions, Tailwind.
next-prisma-web.note: Optional profile. Skills like prisma-migration-reviewer are planned (Phase 2+).

blockchain-crypto.description: On-chain/wallet/transaction reviews. DISABLED BY DEFAULT — must be explicitly enabled.
blockchain-crypto.note: Placeholder. No skills/hooks shipped yet. Never auto-enabled. Enable explicitly with -Profile blockchain-crypto.
